title: Bambos
compiled_truth: Bambos is an external contact at [Stanford](companies/stanford). Over the corpus period (2000-02-23 to 2001-10-22), Bambos sent 9 and received 26 emails, totalling 35 interactions. Top correspondents: [Vince J Kaminski](people/vince-j-kaminski) (8), [Stinson Gibner](people/stinson-gibner) (5), [Vkaminski](people/vkaminski-aol) (2), [Gappy](people/gappy-stanford) (2), [Shirley Crenshaw](people/shirley-crenshaw) (1).
